ocr_findings.description: Image reads '手順をくぐり抜けた攻撃を仕掛けられるリスク' but cleaned MD has '手順そのものに穴や抜けた欠陥を狙撃を仕掛けられるリスク' — phrasing diverges from image text, altering the meaning of the sentence.

reviewer_notes: Well-structured content page on 情報セキュリティ対策基準 and 実施手順. Table with 3 columns (内容/策定者/公開範囲) is fully captured. One mid-severity phrase-level divergence in the 実施手順 paragraph; all other sections including the 試験にはコレが出る！ box are faithful.
